text: Being here, I feel surrounded by creativity and purpose—a space where curiosity meets technological advancement. The quiet hum of preparation in the glass-walled room hints at anticipation and collaboration. The vibrant R+D display evokes excitement and a reflective mood, as I consider humanity’s ongoing quest to innovate meaningfully. Here, I am both observer and participant, invigorated by the sense of possibility that infuses every detail of this environment.
